title: Add support for networking on FreeBSD
body:
This adds networking support for FreeBSD containers, including shared networking for containers in a pod (although pod support for FreeBSD will be in a later PR). To allow for this, we create a jail to own the networking resources and the runtime will use that as a parent jail for the containers.

This PR follows a similar pattern to #15632, first adding an implementation derived from the podman-on-freebsd prototype and then iteratively reducing duplication with the linux implementation by moving shared code to networking_common.go.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: LGTM, though I'm not enough of a FreeBSD expert to comment much on the new FreeBSD network code
